footer.tagline: Sacred streetwear. Limited runs. No noise.
footer.description: HEBREW creates unique pieces for those who dare to be different and worship freedom in their soul. Each product is handcrafted by Vietnamese hands with the desire to bring the work to the world.
footer.verifiedByMinistry: VERIFIED BY MINISTRY OF INDUSTRY AND TRADE
hero.tagline: ROOTED IN THE STREETS. WRITTEN IN STONE.
lookbook.label: Lookbook
lookbook.title: STREET LITURGY
lookbook.desc: Volume 06 - shot on location in Seoul. Oversized silhouettes, low light, high contrast.
manifesto.label: Manifesto
manifesto.quote: WE DO NOT CHASE TRENDS. WE BUILD GARMENTS THAT OUTLAST THE NOISE.
manifesto.desc: Hebrew is a study in contrast: reverence and rebellion, discipline and disorder. Each piece is numbered, finite, and intentional.
newsletter.label: Newsletter
newsletter.title: FIRST TO KNOW
newsletter.success: You are on the list. Watch your inbox.
productDetail.overview.title: Product Overview
productDetail.overview.story1: {name} is built for daily movement with a premium hand-feel and a sharp silhouette inspired by contemporary Vietnamese street culture.
productDetail.overview.story2: From fit calibration to finishing details, this {category} piece balances bold identity with practical comfort for long wear.
productDetail.specs.title: Technical Details
productDetail.specs.fitValue: Structured oversized fit with natural drape
productDetail.specs.securePrintValue: High-density print inspired by cryptography and blockchain permanence
productDetail.specs.originValue: Crafted in Vietnam with quality-controlled finishing
productDetail.reviews.title: Customer Reviews
productDetail.reviews.seed.review1.name: Anh Minh Tran
productDetail.reviews.seed.review1.conte: The security-inspired graphics feel authentic to Web3 culture. I appreciate how the cryptography and blockchain concept is translated into a wearable design without being gimmicky.
productDetail.reviews.seed.review2.name: Sophia Le
productDetail.reviews.seed.review2.conte: The design is refined and premium in person. The flow from browsing to checkout is also very smooth, making the entire shopping experience feel high-end.
productDetail.reviews.seed.review3.name: Khanh Nguyen
productDetail.reviews.seed.review3.conte: Great quality and fit overall, definitely worth it. Shipping could be a bit faster during peak periods, but the product itself is excellent.
